original_image_tags: A single page of pink/peach-colored paper with three hole-punch marks along the top edge. The paper contains text that is reversed/mirrored, indicating it is the back of a page with ink bleed-through or a transfer impression. There are two stamped markings at the bottom of the page.

elements.description: A scanned page showing faint, reversed typewritten text and two blue stamped annotations. The stamps read: 'RECEIVED 15 9 01 AM' / 'INTERNAL SECURITY' / 'F.B.I.' and 'RECEIVED IG 22 10 09 AM' / 'INTERNAL SECURITY' / 'F.B.I.' Two black punch holes are visible at the top.

judge.reason: Description A claims two stamped markings without quoted text, while Description B provides specific quoted text for those stamps, creating a contradiction on verbatim content that suggests at least one side is hallucinating details.
